details.effect: [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Put 2 Fairy tokens into your EX area.

name: Aria, Lady of the Woods Evolved

details.effect: On Evolve - Summon a Fairy token. On Super-Evolve - Give each Pixie token follower on your field and in your EX area [attack]+1/[defense]+1.

[fanfare] Banish 2 cards named Puppet from your EX area: Put a Lloyd token into your EX area. [act] [engage]: Select a Puppet on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1, Storm, and Bane. Activate only if there are at least 3 Puppetry cards in your cemetery.

[fanfare] If there are at least 3 Festive cards on your field and/or in your EX area, search your deck for a Festive follower not named Nazuri, Bestial Innkeeper that costs 3 or less, summon it, then shuffle.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.

On Evolve - Draw a card. Summon 2 Fairy tokens. On Super-Evolve - Select any number of enemy followers on the field and deal X damage divided between them. X equals the total number of cards on your field and in your hand.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and change its attack and defense to 1.

[fanfare] Summon 2 Puppet tokens. [act] [engage]: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may put a Puppetry card that costs 3 or less from among them into your EX area. It costs 3 less to play this turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Ward. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field. It can't attack enemies during its controller's next turn.
Ward. On Evolve - Search your deck for a Crystalian follower that costs 2 or less, put it into your EX area, then shuffle. It costs 2 less to play this turn.
This can't be played unless a follower you control has left the field this turn. ---------- [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.
When this leaves the field, give your leader [defense]+1 and recover 1 play point.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Summon a Fairy token.
On Evolve - Select up to 2 other Pixie followers on your field and/or in your EX area and give them [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[fanfare][lastwords] Put a Fairy token into your EX area.
[fanfare] Give each other [forestcraft] follower on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[fanfare] Return a Beast card on your field not named Baby Carbuncle to its owner's hand: Draw a card.
Choose 1. If a follower on your field evolved this turn, choose up to 2 instead. (1) Give your leader [defense]+2. (2) Draw a card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. At the start of your end phase, you may put a Steelclad Knight, Shield Guardian, or Knight token into your EX area.

On Evolve - Put the top card of your deck into your EX area. On Super-Evolve - Select an Officer follower on your field and give it [attack]+4/[defense]+4. At the start of your end phase, you may put a Steelclad Knight, Shield Guardian, or Knight token into your EX area.

Storm. [fanfare] Select another Levin follower on your field and give it [attack]+1. [act] [cost03]: Refresh this. Activate only if there are at least 10 [swordcraft] followers in your cemetery, and only once per turn.

[fanfare] Choose up to 2. If there's a Jiemon, Thief Lord on your field, choose up to 3 instead. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and engage it. It doesn't refresh during its controller's next start phase. (2) Draw a card. Put a card from your hand on the top or bottom of your deck. (3) Put 2 Glittering Gold tokens into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.
On Evolve - Summon a Steelclad Knight and Shield Guardian token. On Super-Evolve - Select up to 2 Officer token followers on your field and give them [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Storm.

[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 4 damage and summon an Officer token follower from your EX area. [act] [cost00]: Deal 4 damage to each enemy leader. Draw a card. Activate only if there are at least 3 Officer token followers on your field with different names, and only once per turn.

As an additional cost to play this, engage a Levin follower on your field. ---------- Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 4 damage, give your leader [defense]+2, and, if there's a follower on your field with "Yurius" in its name, draw a card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.

On Evolve - Summon a Knight token. Put a Steelclad Knight or Shield Guardian token into your EX area. [act] [cost00]: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 3 damage to it and its leader. Activate only if there are at least 3 Officer token followers on your field with different names, and only once per turn.

[fanfare] Summon a Shield Guardian or Knight token. [act] [cost00]: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 5 damage and draw a card. Activate only if there are at least 3 Officer token followers on your field with different names, and only once per turn.
Storm. [lastwords] Search your deck for a Rusty, Luxcard Trickster, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.

When this is discarded, look at the top card of your deck. If it's a Levin card, you may reveal it and add it to your hand. ---------- While there are at least 5 Levin cards in your cemetery, this has Storm.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Storm.
Storm. On Evolve - Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.

[fanfare] Summon a Steelclad Knight token. [act] [cost00]: Select an Officer token follower on your field and give it [attack]+2 and Storm. Activate only if there are at least 3 Officer token followers on your field with different names, and only once per turn.

Ward. [fanfare] Put a Steelclad Knight and Shield Guardian token into your EX area. [act] [cost00]: Give your leader [defense]+2. Activate only if there are at least 3 Officer token followers on your field with different names, and only once per turn.
Assail. Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.

Choose 1. If a follower on your field evolved this turn, choose up to 2 instead. (1) Summon a Steelclad Knight, Shield Guardian, and Knight token. (2) Give each Officer token follower on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1.

While there are at least 10 Academic cards in your cemetery, this has Storm. [fanfare] Discard 2 Academic cards: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 5 damage and draw 2 cards. At the start of your end phase, if there are at least 5 Academic cards in your cemetery, summon an Anne's Summoning token.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. [act] Earth Rite: Give this Assail.

On Super-Evolve - Select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and destroy them. Add 2 to a Stack on your field. [act] Earth Rite: Give this Assail. [lastwords] Earth Rite: Put this onto its owner's field engaged.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Draw X cards. X equals the number of other Festive followers on your field. At the start of your end phase, deal each enemy leader damage equal to the number of other Festive followers on your field.

On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to 2 times the number of Festive followers on your field. At the start of your end phase, deal each enemy leader damage equal to the number of other Festive followers on your field.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.

On Evolve - Summon a Strikeform Golem token. Put a Guardform Golem token into your EX area. On Super-Evolve - Draw 2 cards. Whenever a Golem follower is put onto your field, add 1 to a Stack on your field.
[act] [engage], Earth Rite: Summon 2 Guardian Golem tokens. [act] [cost02], discard this: Add 2 to a Stack on your field. Draw a card.
Draw a card. If there are at least 5 Academic cards in your cemetery, put a Looking Smart! token into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Summon a Magic Sediment token.
On Evolve - Give your leader [defense]+2. Add 1 to a Stack on your field.
[fanfare] Discard an Academic card: Draw 2 cards.
Select an enemy follower on the field and change its attack and defense to 1. Spellchain (10) - It loses all abilities.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.
On Evolve - Draw 2 cards. Discard 2 cards.
[fanfare] Choose 1. (1) Summon a Magic Sediment token. (2) Earth Rite: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. [act] [cost02], [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.
Choose 1. If a follower on your field evolved this turn, choose up to 2 instead. (1) Summon a Magic Sediment token. Give your leader [defense]+1. (2) Put a Guardian Golem token into your EX area.
Earth Rite: Summon a Guardian Golem token.
Storm. Intimidate. [fanfare] If you have 10 max play points, give this [attack]+1 and Aura.

This costs 2 less to play if there are at least 4 [dragoncraft] cards in your cemetery that cost 7 or more. ---------- [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Discard a card: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it damage equal to the discarded card's cost and draw a card.

On Evolve - Discard a card: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it damage equal to the discarded card's cost and draw a card. On Super-Evolve - Give your leader [defense]+5. At the start of your end phase, if there are at least 7 [dragoncraft] cards in your cemetery that cost 7 or more, deal 7 damage to each enemy leader.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Activate only if Overflow is active for you. [fanfare] If there's a Mount card on your field, increase your max play points by 1.
On Evolve - Select a Wasteland follower on your field with [evolve] not named Nirle, Draconic Prodigy and evolve it.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. On Super-Evolve - Increase your max play points by 1. Give your leader [defense]+2.
Storm.

[act] [engage], bury this: Summon a Megalorca token. [act] [cost01], [engage], bury this: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. Activate only if there's a Marine follower on your field.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Storm. Intimidate.
Storm. Intimidate.

[fanfare] Draw a card. Discard a card. [act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. Activate only if there are at least 4 [dragoncraft] cards in your cemetery that cost 7 or more.
When this is discarded, you may put it into your EX area. ---------- Rush. [fanfare] If Overflow is active for you, give this [attack]+1 and Assail.

When this is discarded, look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a [dragoncraft] card that costs 7 or more from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. ---------- [fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may summon a [dragoncraft] follower not named Zahar, Stormwave Dragoon from among them. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.
On Evolve - Search your deck for a Dragon's Nest, summon it, then shuffle. Once per turn, when a Dragon's Nest is put from your field into the cemetery, summon a Fire Drake Whelp token.
[fanfare] Select a [dragoncraft] follower on your field and, if you have 10 max play points, give it Storm.
When this is discarded, [cost02]: Summon a Dragon token. ---------- Ward. [fanfare] Summon a Dragon token.
Rush. While Overflow is active for you, this has Storm.
Choose 1. If a follower on your field evolved this turn, choose up to 2 instead. (1) Give your leader [defense]+3. (2) Draw 2 cards.

[fanfare] Summon a Mimi, Right Paw Hellhound and Coco, Left Paw Hellhound token. Necrocharge (10) - Give them Storm. [act] [engage], bury another follower: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Give your leader [defense]-2: Draw a card.

On Evolve - Select up to 3 enemy followers on the field and deal 5 damage divided between them. If your leader's defense is 10 or less, deal 10 damage divided between them instead. On Super-Evolve - Give this Storm.

Storm. [fanfare] Choose 1. If this was put onto the field from the cemetery, choose up to 2 instead. (1) Summon an Arcane Personnel Carrier token. Give your leader [defense]+1. (2) Bury the top 2 cards of your deck. At the start of each opponent's end phase, bury this.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.

Whenever a Departed follower is put onto your field, give your leader [defense]+1. On Evolve - Select a Departed follower in your cemetery that costs 3 or less and summon it. On Super-Evolve - Select a Departed follower in your cemetery that costs 3 or less. Summon it and give it Assail.

[fanfare] Choose up to 3. (1) [cost01]: Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. (2) [cost01]: Give this [attack]+2/[defense]+2 and Ward. (3) [cost01]: Give this [attack]+1/[defense]+1. Draw 2 cards. Discard a card.
Bane. Necrocharge (5) - This has Storm. During your turn, whenever this deals damage to an enemy leader, each opponent discards a card.

[fanfare] Put 2 Ghost or Forest Bat tokens into your EX area.
Select an enemy follower on the field and a follower on your field. Destroy them and draw a card.

[fanfare] Summon 2 Forest Bat tokens. [act] [engage]: Select a Vampire token follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1, Rush, and Drain.
[act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. Activate only if there are at least 10 cards in your cemetery.
[fanfare] Deal 3 damage to your leader. Strike - Give your leader [defense]+5.
[fanfare] Bury the top card of your deck. [act] [engage], bury this: Summon a Ghost token. Activate only if a follower on your field evolved this turn.

While this has at least 4 prayer counters, it's a follower. Strike - Search your deck for an Enstatued Seraph, summon it, then shuffle. At the start of your main phase, select any number of other cards on your field and place a prayer counter on them and this.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. At the start of your end phase, if there are at least 2 amulets on your field, give your leader [defense]+2.

On Evolve - Search your deck for an amulet that costs 3 or less, summon it, then shuffle. On Super-Evolve - Search your deck for an amulet that costs 5 or less, summon it, then shuffle. At the start of your end phase, if there are at least 2 amulets on your field, give your leader [defense]+2.

[fanfare] Search your deck for up to 2 Wasteland cards not named Rana, Dual Cannon Abbess that cost a total of 6 or less, put them into your EX area, then shuffle. They cost 0 to play this turn. Summon a Bullet Bike token. [act] [cost00]: Deal 1 damage to each enemy follower on the field. Activate only once per turn.

[act] [engage] an amulet on your field: Select an enemy follower on the field. It can't attack enemies during its controller's next turn. Activate only once per turn.
